code:
import io
import string

match io.read_line()
when Some(line)
  mut out = ""
  mut tok = ""
  mut first = true
  let n = string.len(line)
  mut i = 0
  while i <= n
    mut is_ws = true
    if i < n
      match string.byte_at(line, i)
      when Some(b)
        if b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13
          is_ws = true
        else
          is_ws = false
        end
      when None
        is_ws = true
      end
    end
    if is_ws
      if not string.is_empty(tok)
        match string.parse_int(tok)
        when Some(v)
          let doubled = v * 2
          if first
            out = "#{doubled}"
            first = false
          else
            out = "#{out} #{doubled}"
          end
        when None
          ()
        end
        tok = ""
      end
    else
      match string.byte_at(line, i)
      when Some(b)
        tok = "#{tok}#{string.from_byte(b)}"
      when None
        ()
      end
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  println(out)
when None
  println("")
end
